prompt_improvements.improvement: Require implementors to avoid duplicate retry-policy constants and ensure one authoritative source for status classification to prevent drift.
When criteria specify status code classes (like 5xx), require tests to cover at least one non-obvious representative status (e.g., 502) in addition to canonical examples.
Before requesting code review, include a brief self-check that each acceptance criterion has an explicit test assertion and that warning logs include required structured fields.
